## Summary


## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual Chrome/Edge native-host flow, if browser or native-host behavior changed

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No Cookie values, auth headers, or auth file contents are logged or exposed
- [ ] Protected-domain matching remains exact-host only
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible behavior changes
